# Hemreform Uppsala

> Custom carpentry, bathrooms, kitchens, painting and full renovations in Uppsala. One contact from start to finish.

> Hemreform: snickeri, badrum, kök, måleri och renovering i Uppsala. En kontakt från start till klart. RUT/ROT. Engelsktalande team. Svar inom 48 h.

## Contact

- Website: https://uppsala.hemreform.se/
- Email: info@hemreform.se
- Phone: +46 76 232 68 74
- Location: Uppsala, Sweden

## Pages

- [Home](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/): Services, process, gallery and contact form
- [Blog](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/blogg/): Renovation guides and articles for Uppsala

## Blog Articles

- [Badrumsrenovering bostadsrätt Uppsala](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/blogg/badrumsrenovering-bostadsratt-uppsala/): Bathroom renovation in a housing cooperative in Uppsala: HOA approval, waterproofing, certification, drains, ROT and what to know before starting.
- [Badrumsrenovering i Uppsala – Pris, ROT & planering](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/blogg/badrumsrenovering-uppsala-pris-planering/): Bathroom renovation in Uppsala: price examples, ROT deduction, waterproofing requirements and step-by-step planning guide.
- [Badrumsrenovering Uppsala pris 2026](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/blogg/badrumsrenovering-uppsala-pris/): What does a bathroom renovation cost in Uppsala 2026? Price ranges, ROT deduction, waterproofing, HOA rules and what drives the cost.
- [Belysning vid renovering i Uppsala – Tips & trender](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/blogg/belysning-renovering-uppsala/): Lighting for your renovation in Uppsala: spotlights, dimmers, LED solutions and smart home lighting – guide to a well-planned lighting programme.
- [Bygglov eller anmälan renovering Uppsala](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/blogg/bygglov-anmalan-renovering-uppsala/): Do you need building permits or notification for your renovation in Uppsala? Guide covering layout changes, load-bearing walls, ventilation and when startbesked is required.
- [Bygglov vid renovering i Uppsala – Regler & undantag](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/blogg/bygglov-renovering-uppsala/): Building permits for renovation in Uppsala: PBL rules, notification requirements, attefall exemptions and practical tips from Uppsala's planning office.
- [Flyttfix i Uppsala – Montering, småreparationer & RUT](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/blogg/flyttfix-uppsala/): Moving in Uppsala? Hemreform helps with furniture assembly, minor repairs and light renovations. RUT and ROT deductions available – move in smoothly.
- [Köksrenovering bostadsrätt Uppsala](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/blogg/koksrenovering-bostadsratt-uppsala/): Guide to kitchen renovation in a bostadsrätt in Uppsala. BRF approval, ventilation rules, electrical requirements and what triggers building notification.
- [Köksrenovering i Uppsala – Kostnadsguide & tips](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/blogg/koksrenovering-uppsala-guide/): Kitchen renovation in Uppsala: cost ranges, material choices, ventilation requirements and ROT deduction tips.
- [Köksrenovering Uppsala pris 2026](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/blogg/koksrenovering-uppsala-pris/): Price guide for kitchen renovation in Uppsala 2026: material choices, layout, plumbing, electricity, ROT deduction and budget tips.
- [Lägenhetsrenovering Uppsala | Pris & planering](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/blogg/lagenhetsrenovering-uppsala/): Renovating an apartment in Uppsala? Cost per sqm, timeline, HOA rules, ROT deduction and smart prioritisation for kitchen, bathroom and surfaces.
- [Måleri i Uppsala – Planering, färgval & ROT-avdrag](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/blogg/maleri-Uppsala-tips/): Painting your home in Uppsala: colour selection, preparation, cost calculation and ROT deduction tips from local professionals.
- [Renovera bostadsrätt i Uppsala – Kostnader & BRF-regler](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/blogg/renovera-bostadsratt-uppsala/): Renovating a tenant-owner apartment in Uppsala: costs, BRF approval process and practical tips for a smooth renovation.
- [Renovera sekelskifteslägenhet Uppsala](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/blogg/sekelskifteslagenhet-renovering-uppsala/): Guide to renovating a turn-of-the-century apartment in Uppsala: stucco, original parquet, BRF rules and how to modernise without destroying character.
- [Specialsnickeri Uppsala | Platsbyggda möbler](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/blogg/specialsnickeri-platsbyggt-uppsala/): Custom carpentry in Uppsala: bespoke wardrobes, kitchen cabinets, bookshelves and storage solutions built to fit your home.
- [Specialsnickeri Uppsala | Garderober & förvaring](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/blogg/specialsnickeri-uppsala/): Custom carpentry in Uppsala: built-in wardrobes, bookshelves, kitchens and smart storage for period, functionalist and modern homes.
- [Totalrenovering Uppsala pris per kvm 2026](https://uppsala.hemreform.se/blogg/totalrenovering-uppsala-pris/): What does a full renovation cost in Uppsala? Price per sqm, process, ROT deduction, project management and common mistakes to avoid.
